case_title: LORI FUJITAKE VS. ELISE RICKI GROSS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUJITAKE, LORI AS TO DEFENDANT GROSS, ELISE RICKI DOES 1 TO 25 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-09-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-10-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-12-2002
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY KRAMER, SHELLEY ANN
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-18-2002.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GROSS, ELISE RICKI
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-24-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-07-2002. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-18-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. AUG-09-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE COMPLAINT-ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. ALL PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COST.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUJITAKE, LORI SERVED MAY-09-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GROSS, ELISE RICKI
ARBITRATOR SHAWN MICHAEL THROWE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-25-2002 THROUGH JAN-23-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-24-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
